mnemonics.title: Core AWS Services
mnemonics.content: **S3**tore it, **Lambda** process it, **Dynamo** remember it. (S3 for storage, Lambda for compute, DynamoDB for database)

mnemonics.title: Core Azure Services
mnemonics.content: **Blob** it, **Function** it, **Cosmos** know it. (Blob Storage for storage, Functions for compute, Cosmos DB for database)

mnemonics.title: Shared Responsibility
mnemonics.content: Provider protects the **Cloud's Foundation** (Infrastructure). Customer protects their **Data and Configuration** (Everything they put on/in it).
